---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Amanah
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Problem It Solves

What problem does this feature solve? User story:

> "As a user, I want to _____ so that _____."

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this feature working:
- Which screen it would live on
- How the user would interact with it
- What data it would show or capture

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches?

## Islamic Finance Alignment

If this feature involves financial calculations or instruments, confirm it aligns with Islamic finance principles (no riba, halal-only).

## Additional Context

- Mockups, wireframes, or references to similar apps
- Relevant roadmap phase: [ ] Phase 1 [ ] Phase 2 [ ] Phase 3 [ ] Phase 4
- Priority: [ ] Nice to have [ ] Important [ ] Critical
